data.title: US Stocks On Edge As Investors Await November Inflation Data: Super Micro, Palantir Among Stocks In Focus
data.description: US indices slightly down in premarket trading on Mon amid mixed global trade. Key economic indicators & inflation data in focus this week. Tech stocks surged, while energy & healthcare lagged. Strong jobs report boosted market sentiment.

data.title: Lundin Exits Europe For $1.5 Billion, Turns Focus To South America
data.description: Lundin Mining sells European mines to Boliden for up to $1.52B, focuses on South America. Neves-Corvo and Zinkgruvan boost Boliden's zinc production.

data.title: Tesla Reduces Supercharging Prices To Accelerate EV Adoption Amid Slowing Demand
data.description: EV giant Tesla Inc has been reducing the price for charging at its supercharger network in a bid to accelerate electric vehicle adoption, company executive Max de Zegher said on Saturday.

data.title: Tesla Shares Surge In Pre-Market On Monday, Hovering Near $400: What's Going On?
data.description: This increase follows Tesla's announcement of a new, affordable vehicle model during an investor meeting with Deutsche Bank.

data.title: Larger Fonts, Bigger Impact: iQIYI Makes Entertainment More Accessible
data.description: iQIYI introduces 'Extra Large Font' feature to enhance accessibility for senior and visually impaired users.
